title: Eligibility for disability retirement
doc_html:
§1783.  Eligibility for disability retirement

A member shall be eligible to retire and receive a disability benefit if he has at least five years of creditable service, is not eligible for normal retirement, and suffers disability.

Acts 1978, No. 788, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 33:7233 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.
